ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the movement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the movement occurred */,
  "x_axis" REAL /* x-axis coordinate of the movement */,
  "y_axis" REAL /* y-axis coordinate of the movement */,
  "z_axis" REAL /* z-axis coordinate of the movement */,
  "source_device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device that recorded the movement */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location (latitude, longitude) where the movement occurred */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the device at the time of the movement */,
  "is_synced" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the movement data has been synced to the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movement_types" (
  "movement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement type */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Name of the movement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the movement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movement_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movement being classified */,
  "movement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movement_classifications_movement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("movement_type_id") REFERENCES movement_types ("movement_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movement_classifications_movement_id FOREIGN KEY ("movement_id") REFERENCES movements ("movement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movement being measured */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "is_calculated" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the metric is calculated or directly measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movement_metrics_movement_id FOREIGN KEY ("movement_id") REFERENCES movements ("movement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_metrics" (
  "user_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being measured */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period over which the metric is aggregated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movement_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the movements */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device used during the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location (latitude, longitude) where the session occurred */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name given to the session by the user */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movement_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_metrics" (
  "session_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session metric */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session being measured */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "is_calculated" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the metric is calculated or directly measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES movement_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movement_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movement being annotated */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movement_annotations_movement_id FOREIGN KEY ("movement_id") REFERENCES movements ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movement_annotations_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
